programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Breeder
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty with some fainting goats, breeding exotic insects, while helping to remove tree stumps. Mike decides to take on the dirty jobs that other do day in and day out.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger
programme.desc: After joining the Bowie BaySox team as a groundskeeper, Mike joins the Watson Water Company and digs through mud, rock, gravel, sand and water as they drill for heating and water in Tennessee.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: I Quit: Picking Up the Pieces
programme.desc: With $100k looming near, the entrepreneurs aim to prove that they can successfully grow their businesses. But disagreements between partners explode, leading to frayed relationships, risky investments and shattered expectations.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Shark Researcher
programme.desc: Mike Rowe braves shark-infested waters off the coast of Massachusetts as he lends a hand to shark biologist Greg Skomal.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sewer Inspector
programme.desc: Mike joins a sewer inspector on patrol, braving the cockroach and rat-infested sewers of San Francisco. Then he helps a disaster clean-up crew after a Brooklyn toilet explodes from sewer backup and does some backbreaking work at a demolition company.

programme.title: I Quit: Picking Up the Pieces
programme.desc: With $100k looming near, the entrepreneurs aim to prove that they can successfully grow their businesses. But disagreements between partners explode, leading to frayed relationships, risky investments and shattered expectations.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pig Farmer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe faces the challenges of feeding and cleaning up after hundreds of dirty pigs. Then, he learns how to care for a new litter of piglets, and artificially inseminates a female pig.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown
programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Hot Air Balloon/ Woolly Mammoth Tusk
programme.desc: Owner Paul Brown and the Gallery 63 team prepare for their next auction, which includes a Wooly Mammoth tusk and a giant sapphire. Manager Cindy faces her fears and goes up in a hot air balloon with Paul and their client who is selling it.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: KW Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: In Key West, Rush and Ali wait for the right conditions for their day of bottom fishing.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the stories behind millionaire Jim Thompson's disappearance in Malaysia, an ancient city's collapse in Cambodia and a celebration of death in Bolivia.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Marines - Chad Shevlin
programme.desc: Chad Shevlin shares how he survived being hit in the face by a rocket-propelled grenade.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Hatching
programme.desc: Collecting eggs from a coop can be an adrenaline rush for even hardcore outdoors people.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hudson Valley Retreat
programme.desc: Peter and Ashley Jensen build a sustainable straw bale panel house in the Hudson Valley, the first of its kind in the States. With only three months to work, the race against nature is as they attempt to finish before the East Coast winter sets in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Under House Arrest
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid return victorious from the moose hunt, uniting the band for the first time. But a sudden cold spell leads to a scramble to make winter shelters. Oliver's refusal to follow the group's plan leads to an explosive confrontation.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hollywood Meets Bollywood
programme.desc: Stephanie tries to please her squabbling parents, and a former pageant queen wants a dress with a Hollywood-meets-Bollywood vibe.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Whose Side Are You On?
programme.desc: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom. Also, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie's contentious relationship makes them unwelcome guests wherever they go.

programme.title: Full House: Designing Mothers
programme.desc: Vicky's mother almost ruins Danny's and Vicki's relationship by insisting they marry.

programme.title: Full House: The Dating Game
programme.desc: Both Joey and Stephanie try to turn friendly dinner dates into romantic first dates.

programme.desc: D.J. forgets about Kimmy's 16th birthday until the last minute and plans a party for her.

programme.title: Full House: The Heartbreak Kid
programme.desc: When D.J.'s boyfriend gives Michelle a valentine, she starts making wedding plans.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter/ The Fry Cook Games
programme.desc: Customers love SpongeBob's jellyfish Krabby Patty. The fast food Olympics take place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Secret Struggle
programme.desc: Steel learns that Nate and Zoey have feelings for each other and tries to bring them together, despite the strict Grid Battleforce rules that forbid relationships between Rangers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount
programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Adventures Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Cyclone Winston, a record-breaking storm tears apart islands in the South Pacific, causing unprecedented rainfall and endangering two backpackers on a volunteering project.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Free the Highway
programme.desc: The OPP must organize recovery crews when a 70-vehicle whiteout crash shuts down Highway 400. The Sarnia team struggles to recover a trailer without losing the load.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Pull 'n Pray
programme.desc: Eric is working to find his place on the County/Coxon team when a T-bone semi collision spurs them into action. A blizzard sends Andrew on an urgent rescue mission.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Big Problem
programme.desc: An air ambulance takes off when a pileup results in serious casualties. A veteran operator rescues a leaning trailer.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Nerves of Steel
programme.desc: A whiteout pile-up scatters heavy I-beams across the highway, testing James and his crew; Kevin must lift a 20,000-pound chunk of steel off the road. Herb's crew stares down a huge mess and a marathon recovery in tough condition.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: The Wrath of Weather
programme.desc: A sleeping volcano erupts and sends hundreds running for their lives, more than a dozen elementary school students are the unknowing targets of a violent microburst, and window washing is always risky.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Wreck. Recover. Repeat.
programme.desc: Al Quiring races to recover a trailer and open the TransCanada before the morning rush. Jamie runs a race of his own when a semi carrying a load of pharmaceuticals plunges down a bank. In Alberta, the burdens of running the shop solo take a toll on Colin.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Ice Storm
programme.desc: A downpour of freezing rain covers Hope and the Coq in a thick layer of ice, cutting off communication and crippling Jamie's operations. Ken Monkhouse heads to a job up a remote, ice-covered hill and relives the worst day of his life.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: You Can't Argue With Gravity
programme.desc: Al and Gord from Quiring Towing rescue a loaded semi that's teetering on the edge of a 300-foot drop. When a new client needs Colin's help, he faces a white-knuckle drive on a remote Alberta back road. Jamie tests out a new driver.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: My Purpose Is to Protect
programme.desc: When Jamie and Jason Davis Heavy Recovery crews team up for a massive wreck, a close call forces Brandon to reconsider his future in the business. In Alberta, attempts to straighten out a jackknifed truck get twisted in unexpected directions.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Blood Moons and Mud Explosions

programme.title: Weird Earth: Sky Rings and Flying Spiders

programme.title: Weird Earth: Breathing Forests and Fizzing Fireballs
programme.desc: What is the huge fizzing fireball filmed crashing through a farmer's field? Why does a forest seem to be breathing? And a mysterious horizontal cloud puzzles Japanese airplane passengers.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house. He fabricated a story about his mother beating him as a means of getting CPS involved. If she doesn't progress, she could lose her son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara/ Richard
programme.desc: Barbara has been a hoarder her entire life, but it spiralled out of control after the deaths of her two sons. Richard became a hoarder after his life went downhill.

programme.title: Hoarders: Carrie/ James
programme.desc: Carrie's hoarding stems from a long string of abuse at the hands of family members. James is an ex-Marine who insists that he is not a hoarder.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathleen/ Scott
programme.desc: Kathleen's hoarding began after her husband was killed in a train accident. Scott has bought hundreds of buildings and filled them with things he obsessively buys.

programme.title: Hoarders: Constance and Jeri Jo
programme.desc: Constance is a food hoarder and her daughter will contact the authorities if she doesn't get help. Jeri Jo is married to a convicted murderer who's in jail for life, and she claims her loneliness causes her to hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Movie: Snitch
programme.desc: In order to free his son, who was framed during a drug deal, a father goes undercover for the DEA.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Eggman
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Eggman
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Heart Attack Sauce
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer definitely knows what NOT to touch at a dog show, Joel Kim Booster knows a hipster chicken when he sees one, and Chris Distefano may be single after his flirting in this one.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: It's Damien's House
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer has a surefire sexy way to get out of picking up the check, Julian McCullough takes a lot of heat for his 'drug dealer' shirt, and Tone Bell has harsh words for karaoke goers.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: We're Going Hard Tonight
programme.desc: Paul Virzi proves he's your kids worst camp counselor, Gina Yashere defends women in fedoras, and Josh Wolf risks beheading if he ever travels back to England.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Other's Day
programme.desc: Jessimae Peluso makes an impassioned plea to the church of Scientology, Clayton English explains how Jessimae's name and trailer parks are synonymous, and Noah Gardenswartz is now very worried about his weight.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Hustle vs. Muscle
programme.desc: A muscle-bound competitive eater and his new fiancée appear to have the edge in the pepperdome as they go against a duo of brothers who'll have to put their sibling rivalry aside if they want to walk away with the cash.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Babish
programme.desc: Binging with Babish may be known for his popular cooking show, but today he tackles spicy food. In a first, he is the first guest to make his own wings.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Nick Offerman
programme.desc: Nick Offerman discusses his love affair with white oak, explores modern masculinity and responds to the internet's favorite Ron Swanson-isms.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 4
programme.desc: We’ve got not one, but 20 brain-addled thrill-seekers ready to amaze you with their idiocy, including a bullfighter with bad judgment and smashed-up stunt skiers.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 5
programme.desc: A hung-over hang-glider, several BMX klutzes, and a naked motorcycle stunt guy who gets road rash in the worst possible place.

programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future II
programme.desc: After travelling to the year 2015 to fix his future family's problems, Marty finds himself having to return once again to 1955 to stop Biff from further altering time.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future III
programme.desc: A time traveller ventures to 1885 to prevent his friend's murder and preserve the future.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face
programme.desc: Kevin Hart and his wife Eniko, along with couples Terry and Rebecca Crews, Sarah Hyland and her fiancé Wells Adams and Joel and Sarah McHale take part in a game night that viewers can take part in from home. The couples will be awarded money for charity.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Sweatsuit Charades and Donuts Holes
programme.desc: Niecy Nash and Wendy Raquel Robinson, Victor Cruz and Karrueche Tran, and Rob Schneider and Patricia Maya Schneider compete remotely from their home in a night of fun and games.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner Cook-Off
programme.desc: Chefs are cooking every meal on the menu: breakfast, lunch and dinner. First, they must make a sweet and savoury breakfast from items found in the store's clearance carts. Then, a family lunch is complicated by a red light special.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Smothered and Covered
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is covering all things smothered, starting with some mole sauce masters in Salt Lake City. Then, in Florida, a diner is dishing out down-home comfort food like biscuits and gravy, and a joint in Reno, NV, is servin' up sweetbreads in style.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Trapped in a Nightmare
programme.desc: Six teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master create mind-blowing and yummy Halloween-themed displays that depict the horror of being trapped in a nightmare and unable to wake up.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Zombie Dating Show
programme.desc: Five teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master create amazing and tasty Halloween-themed displays that mix fear and romance in a depiction of a zombie dating show.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: The Swarm
programme.desc: Four teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master go into battle to imagine their most terrifyingly tasty displays yet.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Other Holiday Mascots Go Trick-or-Treating
programme.desc: The three teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master create stunning and scrumptious Halloween-themed displays that show how well-known holiday mascots like Santa and the Easter Bunny go trick-or-treating.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Scary Tales II
programme.desc: In the spine-tingling finale of Halloween Wars, the final two teams made up of an expert pumpkin carver, a cake artist and a sugar master have slaughtered the competition and are ready to face off in an epic showdown.

programme.title: Giada in Italy: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: On Capri, Giada De Laurentiis makes a beautiful picnic to celebrate la dolce vita, or the sweet life, by the water with her daughter and mother. The menu features Amalfi lemon chicken, grilled plum and pistachio salad.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Money-Saving Showstoppers
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is serving a brunch that's easy on the wallet but full of flavour. His straight-from-the-pantry menu features an Italian egg bread bowl, a spinach salad with everything bagel croutons and a lemon caper dill vinaigrette.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Simply French
programme.desc: Ina is focusing on easy French food that you can make at home, like a classic cheese board and toasted baguette.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Be Prepared!
programme.desc: Valerie helps a brand new Cub Scout - her young nephew, Enzo - earn his cooking badge with some quick and easy dishes. Together, they create an after-school snack of no-bake granola bars with a carob 'chocolate' drizzle, followed by a pasta dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 14
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is serving up easy, delicious Labor Day eats. There are Crispy Wings with Hot Honey Sauce and spicy Pimento Cheese Grits. For something sweet, Ree makes divine Peach Shortcakes and a refreshing Ginger Cherry Limeade Spritzer.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Make It Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making things easy with four great recipes. First, there's easy queso to go with pork carnitas that have a shortened cooking time thanks to a multicooker. A humble sheet of foil is the secret to awesome brown sugar ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Ranch Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a quick and easy ranch-style cookout. She makes super-fast Caribbean Burgers with Mango Slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma, and her Sunshine Pasta Salad and Lemon Mustard Dressing is a colorful side dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Game Food
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is dishing up great ideas for quick and easy game-day dishes. First, she knocks mashups out of the park with five-cheese Pepperoni Pizza Queso.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Meaty Magic
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is sharing her juiciest, meatiest recipes of all time, starting with her fried chicken sandwiches and pork sticky ribs. She also makes rhubarb short ribs, hearty orecchiette with broccolini and sausage and crispy corned beef hash waffles.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Bring on the Meat
programme.desc: Whether it's grilled, seared, smoked or baked, Trisha Yearwood has meat covered. She and her friend, Glenda, look back on Trisha's tastiest savory specialties, including breakfast burgers.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Healthy And Easy
programme.desc: After indulging in rich food on the road, Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to the ranch to balance things out with healthy dishes that don't sacrifice flavor. Rocco DiSpirito makes an incredibly juicy but lean straight-up cheeseburger.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quick and Easy Fall Favorites
programme.desc: Get a taste of all the flavours of fall with these quick and easy meals including weeknight chicken chili, seasonal fall stir fry, and cheesy chicken pasta with broccoli and bacon. Plus, a caramel apple bomb pie and a pear bubbly cocktail.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Picnic Perfect
programme.desc: Easy meals to prep and pack make any picnic perfect. Jeff Mauro creates a crowd-pleasing sandwich, his Sausage Muffuletta. Katie Lee gives a lesson on making quick pickles.

programme.title: All-star Best Thing I Ever Ate: Marvelous Meats
programme.desc: Food Network's biggest stars tell where to get the best giant steaks, flame-roasted chops and succulent carvings. Martha Stewart tries flame-grilled wagyu and Guy Fieri shows where to get his favourite meaty burrito.

programme.title: All-star Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sensational Sandwiches
programme.desc: Rachael Ray shares her favourite pork sandwich in Philly and Valerie Bertinelli shares her cheesiest croque madame in LA. For the home chef, Bobby Flay shares his lobster roll recipe and Anne Burrell teaches a pulled pork sandwich.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 2
programme.desc: Batman and Commissioner Gordon have a slumber party and watch their favorite TV shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 3
programme.desc: Batman would rather watch TV then go to his own birthday party. Beast Boy and Cyborg act as Knight Rider.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 4
programme.desc: Batman and Commissioner Gordon go camping, but watch TV rather than doing fun outdoor activities.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 5
programme.desc: Batman pretends to be sick so he and Commissioner Gordon can go around town watching their favourite shows.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League's Next Top Talent Idol Star
programme.desc: A comedic look at the superheroes’ lives. Viewers will finally get the opportunity to watch what life is like for the super teens when their capes are left at home.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League’s Next Top Talent Idol Star: Second Greatest Team Edition
programme.desc: The Justice League holds another talent competition to find the second-best superhero team in the world. The competition heats up and the Titans must find a way to beat the Hive Five.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Justice League's Next Top Idol Star: Justice League Edition
programme.desc: The funny business that happens in between saving the world and being teenagers.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Two Parter: Part One
programme.desc: The Titans visit the Hall of Justice to use the pool, then decide to check out the inside.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Two Parter: Part Two
programme.desc: The Titans must save the members of the Justice League from the clutches of the supervillain Darkseid.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Thanks for Waiting, Lord Beerus! A Super Saiyan God is Born At Last!
programme.desc: Shenron informs Goku that Super Saiyan God is a transformation, not a person. All the Saiyans join together to help Goku, but they need Videl to join in too. With the help Gohan's big news, Goku manages to get a new hair-do.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Show Us, Goku! The Power of a Super Saiyan God!
programme.desc: Now that Goku is a God, he and Beerus can have a real fight! Though, Goku has a bit of trouble figuring out his new divine power. Seeing that Goku has real potential, Beerus says he is going to stop holding back.

programme.title: American Dad!: Naked to the Limit, One More Time
programme.desc: Roger pretends to be Jeff's imaginary friend so he can freely roam naked around the house with no disguise. But when big-mouth Jeff figures out that Roger is an alien, Stan issues an ultimatum: either Roger or Jeff must be killed immediately.

programme.title: American Dad!: Seizures Suit Stanny
programme.desc: When Stan lies about his texting and driving accident, he takes a seizure medication and suffers from the side effects. Meanwhile, Roger helps Steve with his performance anxiety.

programme.title: American Dad!: Spelling Bee My Baby
programme.desc: Francine discovers Steve's special talent that will help him get into a great school: spelling. But when she fears that Steve is being distracted by Hiko's sister, Akiko, she takes drastic measures to ensure victory.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Something Ricked This Way Comes
programme.desc: Rick goes to battle with the devil, and Summer gets upset about it, broh. Plus Jerry and Morty hang out, broh!

programme.title: Family Guy: The Former Life of Brian
programme.desc: Brian surprises his former flame, Tracy, with a visit and learns that he is the father of her unruly son, Dylan. When she dumps Dylan at the Griffins for Brian to raise, the boy begins terrorizing the household.

programme.title: Family Guy: Long John Peter
programme.desc: Peter gets a pet parrot, and after raising hell and terrorizing the neighbours, the animal comes to an early demise. Meanwhile, Chris goes with Brian to the vet and falls for the intern.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super: Goku the Talent Scout: Recruit Krillin and Android 18
programme.desc: Goku and his friends take on their strongest foe yet.

programme.title: Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind: His Name Is Diavolo
programme.desc: After the conclusion of his skirmish with Secco, Bucciarati battles the clock to get to the Colosseum before his body reaches its breaking point.

programme.title: Assassination Classroom: Karma Time
programme.desc: Karma Akabane, a former classmate of Nagisa's, joins 3-E and immediately gets involved in the new assassination mission.

programme.title: Black Clover: A New Resolve
programme.desc: On their way to Hage, Asta and the gang run into Yuno and Sylph who join them on their journey. The Magic Knights tour the new schoolhouse and help teach the younger children.

programme.title: Fire Force: The Secrets of Pyrokinesis
programme.desc: Vulcan settles in at the 8th, while Captain Obi meets with Hibana, Konro and Karim to exchange data. In order to improve their fighting skills, Konro proposes that Shinra and Arthur be given combat training in Asakusa.

programme.title: Naruto: Shippuden: The Fallen Castle
programme.desc: While Team Asuma finally brings Shu into custody, Naruto struggles to act as his double.

programme.title: Samurai Jack: XCVIII
programme.desc: Samurai Jack and Ashi set off on a dangerous quest to recover Jack’s lost sword.

programme.title: Gemusetto Machu Picchu: Chapter 3B: Back Spin
programme.desc: Makasu defeats religious pantheons in sports and steals their mystical artifacts.

programme.title: The Boondocks: Wingmen
programme.desc: The Freeman's head back to their hometown of Chicago when Granddad's is asked to perform a eulogy, and realize how much they have changed.

programme.title: The Venture Brothers: Dr. Quymn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Dr. Venture encounters his childhood friend, Dr. Tara Quymn.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Waits With You
programme.desc: Waiting is the hard part, says that popular song. In this episode, Joe Pera and you wait for his Nana to finish her appointment, so they can go to Friday night fish fry.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Guides You Through the Dark
programme.desc: When the power goes out on a Summer evening, Joe Pera takes you outside to wander around the neighborhood and see what his neighbors are up to. Featuring some of Michigan’s best lighthouses.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Takes You to the Grocery Store
programme.desc: A teacher, Joe Pera, in Michigan's Upper Peninsula explores interesting subject matters.

programme.title: Joe Pera Talks With You: Joe Pera Goes to Dave Wojcek's Bachelor Party With You
programme.desc: A teacher, Joe Pera, in Michigan's Upper Peninsula explores interesting subject matters.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Self-Indulgent 200th Episode Spectacular
programme.desc: When their world starts disappearing, the Titans must confront their creators; the Titans discover how hard cartoons are to produce when they make one about Michael and Aaron.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Wynton's Reality Show/ Bakugan Soccer
programme.desc: Dan Kouzu and his friends bond with strange aliens known as Bakugan.

programme.title: Ben 10: Tokyo Fun
programme.desc: While in Tokyo, Team Tennyson comes face to face with a horrible secret. While on a visit to the Sumo Slammers Amusement Park, Team Tennyson gets to watch a genuine sumo wrestling match.

programme.title: Ben 10: Growing Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen enter a skating competition, but it is interrupted when Nanny Nightmare shows up and turns the other competitors into babies.

programme.title: Ben 10: The Hex Factor
programme.desc: Hex confuses an exclusive magic club with a secret wizard society that wronged him. Ben must avoid getting kicked out of the magic club in order to stop Hex.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Flashback
programme.desc: A flashback to how the Teen Titans first formed.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBCYFSHIPBDAY
programme.desc: Beast Boy and Cyborg celebrate the birthday of their friendship.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Chicken in the Cradle
programme.desc: Beast Boy lays an egg, but instead of taking care of his newly-hatched chick he goofs off and lets the others deal with it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Beast Girl
programme.desc: As the Titans deal with Madame Rouge, Beast Boy is excited to meet his female counterpart Beast Girl.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Tower Renovation

programme.desc: When the male Titans are injured, Raven and Starfire must become bros to stop the Bropocalypse.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Power of Shrimps

programme.title: Ninjago: The Temple of Madness

programme.desc: Soft after recent victory, the ninja are ill-prepared when a dangerous new enemy rises.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mothers/ The Password
programme.desc: On Mother's Day, the kids put the mothers through a series of trials to find out who the best mother is. When the kids find out Anais is Richard's favourite child, Gumball and Darwin try to take the title.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Procrastinators/ The Shell
programme.desc: Gumball inadvertently cracks open Penny's shell and discovers who she really is inside. While performing a school play, Gumball is so nervous about kissing Penny that he accidentally headbutts her and cracks open her shell.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Mirror/ The Burden
programme.desc: When Gumball refuses to forward a scare email, the curse becomes all too real; Gumball and Darwin are put in charge of their school's ancient hamster.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Bros/ The Man
programme.desc: Granny Jojo brings a boyfriend to her birthday meal; The Wattersons and Larry both have a terrible day.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Pizza/ The Lie
programme.desc: A frustrated Larry decides to quit all of his jobs resulting in an apocalypse in Elmore. Gumball and Anais create a new holiday in January to get everyone out of their funk.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Butterfly/ The Question
programme.desc: Gumball learns the true meaning of The Butterfly Effect. In Biology class, Gumball and Darwin are waiting for a butterfly to emerge from its chrysalis.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Oracle/ The Safety
programme.desc: Gumball tries to avoid an embarrassing event predicted by Banana Joe's mother. Darwin becomes obsessed with safety after viewing a Health and Safety video.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The End Was Here
programme.desc: Craig researches the ancient war that destroyed the Creek so that he can help avoid history from repeating itself.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: In the Key of the Creek
programme.desc: During a rainy day, Craig uses his toys to create a Creek adventure.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Children of the Dog
programme.desc: Craig has spent years trying to get his parents to get him a dog with no avail, but a charismatic creek kid may be able to help him get his dream dog.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Jessica Shorts
programme.desc: Five shorts following Craig's little sister Jessica as she tries to become the best at video games, experiences losing a tooth, creates a T.V show, saves a sword, and takes family game night too seriously.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #RageCat
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #BeastsInShow
programme.desc: When Babs and Kara spar over whose dog is better, they decide to settle it at the Metropolis Dog Show, where Ace the Bat-Hound and Krypto the Superdog suddenly find themselves called upon to save the day… in more ways than one.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Real Orangins!
programme.desc: Robin tries again to tell the REAL origin story of the Teen Titans.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Quantum Fun
programme.desc: Robin takes the other Titans on a trip through the dizzying world of quantum physics.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Repeated Blows to His Unformed Head
programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Corey's Been Dead for An Hour
programme.desc: Charlie becomes annoyed with Alan for constantly sponging off him and promising to cover the tab 'next time.' When Alan tries to leave Charlie the cheque for dinner with two women, Charlie tries to beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Walnuts and Demerol
programme.desc: As Charlie prepares for a steamy Christmas Eve with his date, friends and family keep dropping in and staying. When Evelyn discovers who Charlie's date is, she inexplicably becomes desperate to break them up before they go too far.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Worry, Speed Racer
programme.desc: When Jake tells Charlie and Alan that he often overhears his mother and Herb having sex, it triggers a repressed memory for Charlie. Rose tries to help Charlie work through the problem.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That's Summer Sausage, Not Salami
programme.desc: After getting to know Danielle, Charlie discovers that she shares some common interests with Alan and proceeds to set them up, but when things begin to heat up between them, Charlie becomes jealous.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Damn Stalker
programme.desc: When Rose announces she is moving to London, Charlie must face his true feelings for her. Meanwhile, Alan fudges his profile on an Internet dating service, attracting a fellow profile embellisher, Beverly.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Young People Have Phlegm Too
programme.desc: A sexy young girl who Charlie has been dating cajoles him into going to a hot new club and bringing Alan along to meet her friend. When they arrive, Charlie and Alan are mortified to learn that the partygoers consider them 'old.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Merely Slept With a Commie
programme.desc: When Evelyn expresses sympathy for a friend who had no mourners at her funeral, Alan and Charlie inform her that she's headed for the same fate. Instead of taking their comments as a motive to change, she cunningly makes them regret what they said.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Big Dougie
programme.desc: Feeling the need to volunteer his time, Doug becomes a Big Brother and attempts a 10K run.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Soft Touch
programme.desc: Doug realizes that his neighbour has suckered him into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Restaurant Row
programme.desc: Carrie bans Doug from going to his favourite restaurant because the staff is so rude.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flower Power
programme.desc: Doug tries to prove that he is romantic when Carrie is jealous of a co-worker's flowers.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus
programme.desc: Richard plays the part of the jealous ex-husband when he learns that Christine is enjoying her fifth date with a new beau, Burton. He even goes as far as to sabotage the happy couple's goodnight kiss and intentionally insults Burton.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Other F Word
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to promote racial and ethnic diversity at Ritchie's exclusive private school has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Long Day Journey Into Stan
programme.desc: Following Christine's break-up with Burton, everyone expects her to fall apart emotionally but she insists she is fine and looking forward to spending time alone. But after being humiliated in a restaurant she realizes that she really did care for him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Teach Your Children Well
programme.desc: Christine feels pressured to throw an extravagant party for Ritchie's birthday, his first involving kids from his new school. Recoiling from sticker shock after meeting with an event planner, Christine decides to have an arts and crafts party at home.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: Christine tries not to have a meltdown when her ex-husband, Richard, brings his 'new' Christine with him to pick up Ritchie and take him to breakfast so that they can get to know one another.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce
programme.desc: Christine's former marriage counsellor comes into the gym, leading to some awkwardness between the women. When Christine mentions this to Richard, his cryptic reaction leads her to wonder if it was in the counsellor's interest to encourage their divorce.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Exile on Lame Street
programme.desc: Fearing that Ritchie is too young to be exposed to sex, drugs and rock and roll vices on display at a Rolling Stones concert, Christine initially forbids it. Eventually, she relents but immediately regrets and in a panic, goes to the venue to keep tabs.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery. However that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: The girls' dates all cancel on them, leaving them to reflect on past experiences.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.desc: The officers are called to arrest a drunken suspect.

programme.desc: Teams use helicopters to radio-collar moose. The wardens rescue two skiers lost in the backcountry. A drunk sledder is caught and blames his nephew. A warden extinguishes a barn fire. A man with outstanding poaching warrants is arrested.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Ice Out
programme.desc: The Maine wardens search under the ice of a frozen lake for the victims of the worst snowmobile accident in recent history.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch

programme.desc: The wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt. An alligator and her hatchlings must be captured and relocated from a school.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Piano in the House

programme.title: Movie: Doom

programme.title: Movie: Acts of Violence

programme.title: Movie: Transporter 3

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Sneak Peek: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: A couple buys a small home in Sylmar, CA, in hopes of finishing quickly and turning a modest profit. On top of a cracked foundation and failing retaining wall, he's willing to take risks that she is not, so Tarek steps in to get them through the project.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Dancing With Disaster
programme.desc: Patricia and Legacy are professional dancers turned house flippers and a high-end project in Brentwood has them seeing dollar signs. Their hideously expensive loan and a major foundation problem threaten to ruin this flip from the start.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Baptism By Fire
programme.desc: Audrey and son Anthony are taking on their first flip together in Woodland Hills. When a devastating fire rips through the house halfway through the project, it threatens to burn up their potential profit as well.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Brother vs. Brother: Hollywood, Here We Come!

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Rock and a Hard Price
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rocking open house for a Trousdale party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes. Flagg struggles to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer, who questions if Flagg is the right fit for her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman Versus Fredrik
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts. Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!
programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Flagg it or Bag it
programme.desc: James and David host a backyard BBQ in Santa Monica, Altman goes after a new modern in Bird Streets, but is shocked when the sellers consider a low-ball offer. Flagg tries to find "Glee" star Becca Tobin her dream home in the historic Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else
programme.desc: Altman races against the clock after being thrown a curveball by his Bird Streets sellers. James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem as the sellers have their own ideas about price, and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Swedish Invasion

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Medieval Time Machine

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.desc: Their affairs are hot... but their tempers are hotter.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Kids
programme.desc: When typical teenage rebellion turns into deadly rage, a parent's love may not be enough to save their life.

programme.title: A Murder in Mansfield
programme.desc: In 1990, the testimony of a 12-year-old boy sealed his father's fate. A jury convicted prominent Ohio doctor John Boyle of murdering Collier's mother. 26 years later, the son returns determined to get an admission of guilt from his imprisoned father.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Outlaw Bikers
programme.desc: Go inside the tightly guarded clubs of outlaw bikers to witness the story that hasn't been told. Discover the truth behind their organizations, and find out if they're really international crime syndicates or social clubs for outcasts and nonconformists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.
