programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Termite Turmoil
programme.desc: A couple are flipping their first house in Pasadena, California, but while she has a lot to learn, nothing slows them down like the house itself. From asbestos removal to termite treatment, they take hit after hit.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Unscrewed Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent takes on a flip with her mom in Bossier City, Louisiana. These novices are in over their heads from the start as basic tools cause a struggle and attempted projects go awry.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: You Can't Handle the Roof!
programme.desc: Days after having their third child, a couple from Mobile, Alabama, throw their first flip into the mix. They move her home office and the kids to the job site. Unexpected hang-ups, like a leaky roof, could be a flood of trouble.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Help Me Sharhonda
programme.desc: A husband-wife duo decides to do most of the construction to save money on their first flip. He has some construction experience, but she's a total newbie and needs guidance, something he struggles to give when it means slowing them down.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Measurable Misfortune
programme.desc: A pair of passionate, yet inexperienced flippers faces constant setbacks due to endless measuring mishaps. They can't seem to complete a project without struggling to get it right the first time, and they find themselves at odds with each other.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Road Trip to Flip
programme.desc: After realizing their hometown of Franklin, TN, is too expensive for their first flip, a couple decides Memphis' market is right for their budget. However, flipping 200 miles from home has its drawbacks and they worry about finishing in four weeks.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flippin' Outdoors
programme.desc: Kitchens and baths may sell homes, but curb appeal draws buyers from the sidewalk into the door. Memorable first time home renovators take on exterior issues from logging to masonry.

programme.title: Restored: 1922 American Colonial Arts and Crafts
programme.desc: Brett takes on a bright pink arts and crafts home with American Colonial elements. He uncovers lots of hidden features while returning the house to its 1922 roots.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Dough Also Rises
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" a classic biscuit show featuring his grandmother, with an entirely new take on the classic quick bread.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Grind Is a Terrible Thing to Waste: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" this classic episode with a surprising new cheeseburger procedure and the "lost" ground meat dish the food sensors nixed back in '99.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Capital Cravings
programme.desc: We visit some of the eateries that satisfy the sweet cravings of Washington, D.C.'s power brokers, including Golden Brown Delicious and Cupcakes Actually.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cool Cookie Sandwiches
programme.desc: There's nothing better than the perfect cookie unless you take two of them and put some filling in between.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Reinvention
programme.desc: In New York City a charming little shop in putting a gourmet spin on a crisp rice treat, with flavours loved by children and adults alike.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Toronto Sweets
programme.desc: We head north of the border to Toronto.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Austin Sweet Freeze
programme.desc: Austin can get sweltering hot but they have plenty of delicious options to keep you cool. At Cow Tipping Creamery, Corey Sorensen is making stackers, her layered version of a sundae.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.
programme.desc: Visit some Los Angeles hotspots that are the sweetest places to start the day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolicious
programme.desc: We're getting the inside scoop on all things chocolate. Alton Brown takes a trip to Charleston, S.C., for some heavenly chocolate pudding, while Aaron Sanchez has some not-so-classic New York pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Eats
programme.desc: It's time for some good, old-fashioned country cooking as Guy Fieri, Alton Brown, Sunny Anderson and Duff Goldman round up their favorite Southern eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bogota
programme.desc: Andrew explores the sky-high flavors of Bogota, Colombia. This mountaintop city keeps warm with hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas, their unique take on the tamale and cheesy hot chocolate.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofy's Hot Dog Harvest/ Puppy Birthday to You
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Twin Henrys
programme.desc: Henry refuses to miss an MMA fight, so sends an android in his place to a family dinner.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Grave Danger
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte investigate when Ray starts behaving strangely and are surprised to discover what's been causing it.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Back to School
programme.desc: After going back to their elementary school to complete a hero assessment exam, Phoebe and Max realize passing a fifth grade test won't be easy when the instructor is a former classmate that Max tormented when they were younger.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Original Prankster
programme.desc: Despite promising his girlfriend he would stop pranking, Max pulls an epic gag that his friend gets blamed for. As the school's principal moves to expel the boy, Max must fix the situation while still keeping his role a secret.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cheese and Crockers/ Land Before Timmy
programme.desc: Timmy wishes up a machine that will allow him to merge with other objects for Half Day.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shadow of Evil
programme.desc: As the TMNT work to lure Baron Draxum out, Splinter tries to get to the bottom of odd goings-on at April's new job.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Portal Jacked! / Warren and Hypno, Sitting in a Tree
programme.desc: Leo must venture to Hidden City to save his brothers; Everyone tries to get something Warren Stone has, but he's not letting it go without a fight, and a side of betrayal.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Loud House: Schooled!
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick Smartpants/ SquidBob Tentaclepants
programme.desc: A knock on the head gives Patrick superior intellect, and Spongebob and Squidward accidentally get melded into one body when Sandy's teleportation machine malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Visit/ To Squarepants or Not to Squarepants
programme.desc: SpongeBob decorates his home like Squidward's so that his neighbour will visit. All of SpongeBob's square pants have shrunk in the dryer, and he can't find any square pants anywhere.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chum Bucket Supreme/ Single Cell Anniversary
programme.desc: Plankton hires Patrick to create advertising slogans for the Chum Bucket. SpongeBob helps Plankton find the perfect anniversary gift for Karen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to earn his belt from karate master Fuzzy Acorns.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Trans-Dimensional Turtles
programme.desc: The Turtles are transported to another dimension, where they meet their 80's alternative-reality counterparts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wanted: Bebop and Rocksteady
programme.desc: When 80s Shredder and Krang appear in our dimension, they employ Bebop and Rocksteady and find their plans are succeeding better than ever.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Lone Rat and Cubs
programme.desc: When Splinter is first mutated, he must learn to survive the life of a mutant on the run while also protecting four baby mutant turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Yojimbo
programme.desc: The Turtles are transported to an alternate dimension where they meet the rabbit samurai, Miyamoto Usagi.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Osoroshi no Tabi
programme.desc: Usagi leads the Turtles through a haunted forest where they encounter mischievous and dangerous spirits.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Kagayake Kintaro
programme.desc: As they reach their destination, Usagi and the Turtles must help Kintaro fulfill his destiny.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro
programme.desc: When Dave gets a parenting app to help supervise the Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control. Alvin, Simon, and the Chipettes give Theodore conflicting dating tips when they believe he has a crush on a girl.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk
programme.desc: When the boys accidently break Dave's new flat screen TV, they decide to become fugitives on the lam. Jeanette and Eleanor act as Sherlock Holmes and Watson when Theodore's teddy bear mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Knights/ Snake Charmer
programme.desc: Theodore hopes to be a knight and comically struggles to do good deeds. Alvin and Simon create a fake snake to help Dave get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Independence Day/ Opposites Attract
programme.desc: When the boys get tired of taking orders from Dave, they decide to build a treehouse in the backyard and move out. When an invention of Simon's accidently gets knocked over it magnetizes Alvin and Simon making them inseparable.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Vicky Gets Fired/ Chindred Spirits
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a girlfriend for his comic book hero; Mom and Dad finally fire Vicky.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Just Desserts/ You Doo
programme.desc: After wishing that all the food in the world were desserts, Timmy helps himself to all the sweets. There is a magic doll that only fairies can make which can give you the power to make other people do whatever you tell them.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Anti-Poof
programme.desc: For every fairy, there's an anti-fairy - thus anti-Poof is born -FOOP!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Can't Spy Me Love
programme.desc: After seeing a cute guy but missing her chance to meet him, Phoebe accesses the Hero League's villain search software to track him down. However, Phoebe's abuse of power leads to unexpected consequences for her crush.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Chutes and Splatters
programme.desc: Phoebe's newest superhero mission is to babysit President Kuckbutt's troublemaking teen daughter, but the assignment quickly snowballs out of control when Phoebe's charge sneaks into the town's illegal nightclub.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Stealing Home
programme.desc: Hank and Phoebe think the house has been robbed when they return home and discover the furniture missing, but Max admits he hid everything and forces them to earn their belongings back before Barb discovers the truth.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Robin Hood: Prince of Pheebs
programme.desc: When Chloe announces that Max is her favorite sibling, Phoebe tries to show her the 'real' Max by telling a Robin Hood-style bedtime story about the great Phoebe Hood and the evil Maxingham.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Lie Detector
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Beast from the Yeast
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Blessious This Messious
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon's Ultimate Awakening!
Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Sister Sister
programme.desc: When a dog trainer is found dead at home, her champion Rottweiler is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Fake It 'til You Make It
programme.desc: After a body turns up in Boston with links to another murder in Los Angeles, Jane and Maura pack up their sunscreen and hop on a plane. With the girls out of town, Angela and Korsak plan a double date with Kiki and Ron.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: 5:26
programme.desc: When an old watch is found inside a balloon of cocaine in a dead woman's stomach, figuring out its significance becomes the key to protecting Jane and the people she loves.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When Maura is abducted, nothing will stand in the way of Jane and the team bringing her home. Far away, Maura discovers a conspiracy that is bigger than just her kidnapping, with Jane as its ultimate target.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Murderjuana
programme.desc: A security guard foils a robbery when he kills one of the robbers, despite being wounded himself. Jane and Maura work together to solve the case after the search for the robber's accomplice raises some puzzling questions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Mountaintop Ambition
programme.desc: The Browns scramble to pull off an extreme wedding as winter arrives on the mountain. Gabe loses a prized possession after an aggressive ostrich attack and the family kicks off their ambitious cabin build.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: Loaded with exclusive new footage from the Bush: Gabe learns to ride a horse while the family constructs a fence around the property. Meanwhile, Gabe and Raquell prepare for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The crew of Infinity enters the Arctic Circle, where they encounter a brutal storm and their first ice. As they push toward the next safe harbor, they run aground in dangerously shallow waters with a wall of ice closing in on them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: France: Mind vs. Matter
programme.desc: Pascale and Eddy are dropped in the Colombian rainforest, an environment so hostile it takes out the best of the best. At every corner caiman, jaguar, poisonous snakes and more are threats. Their journey is translated to English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Terror in Tanzania
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the African Serengeti to survive for 21 days with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Son of A...?
programme.desc: To appease a demanding new client, Steve aims to make a big rig rat rod out of a 1979 Peterbilt that he once drove for his father's steel company.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Water Rat
programme.desc: A family man with a need for speed brings a battered 50's era pickup to Steve looking for a bad ass rat rod the whole family can enjoy. To meet their client's demands the crew need to find a way to add glitz and gloss to a smoke belching monster.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chadillac
programme.desc: Small-town custom car fabricator Chad Hiltz takes on his first build under his new banner at Hiltz Automotive. The team takes a stubborn '57 Cadillac and transforms it into a futuristic, chromed-out roadster fit for a king.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven
programme.desc: The 10th-Annual Rockabilly Weekend car show is right around the corner and Chad has big plans for this year's raffle car! The team races to transform a rusted-out '38 Ford into an open-motor, fenderless hotrod that's guaranteed to sell tickets.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Death Track
programme.desc: Quinn Shireman, longtime rival of the MSO, invites the team to Kentucky for an arm-drop event like no other. Quinn bets JJ that the MSO can't win and brings with him a team of heavy hitters to make sure no one from Memphis has a shot at the cash prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Chasing Kentucky's Commonwealth
programme.desc: JJ's Arm Drop event in Kentucky continues and the MSO is still struggling to knock out Quinn's hired guns. The stakes are high and if Memphis cannot manage to win the entire event, they'll lose their side bet with Quinn and go home in the red.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Slam Donks
programme.desc: Tony Yeager and Whitfield roll into town with a group of local Donk-driving racers ready to call JJ out. The familiar foes have a plan to get inside JJ's head by going after the girls and hopefully pull out a win against the MSO.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Reigning for Benji's
programme.desc: JJ brings in the country's best small-tire racers, including some big-name foes, to challenge the MSO for a shot at $16,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: OG Armdrop
programme.desc: MSO fights for a win with just half of their team in round two of JJ's small-tire race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: Nashville street racers call out the MSO to see who really runs the streets of Tennessee. Memphis never backs down from a challenge, but with Ziptie out of commission and Heifer having trouble, the team must really step up if they want to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Liars!
programme.desc: The MSO is surprised when a group of racers claiming to be from Delaware turns out to be a team of racers from all over America. This all-star group is made of familiar faces who have suffered losses at the hands of the MSO and are now hungry for revenge.

programme.title: Intervention: Jimbo

programme.title: Intervention: Nathan

programme.title: Intervention: Courtney

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught By Surprise
programme.desc: Warden Price is on a mission to arrest out-of-state hunters with warrants for trespassing and hunting on private property. A young angler is haunted by his past and is taken to county jail, and Warden Richards questions a pair of dishonest fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Tempers Are Rising
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign. Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run, and Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Tempers Are Rising
programme.desc: Warden Cummings deals with an angry man who blew a stop sign. Warden Boone helps chase a trio of armed robbers on the run, and Warden Inman investigates a group of suspected deer hunters for trespassing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught By Surprise
programme.desc: Warden Price is on a mission to arrest out-of-state hunters with warrants for trespassing and hunting on private property. A young angler is haunted by his past and is taken to county jail, and Warden Richards questions a pair of dishonest fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Roundup
programme.desc: On this special episode, Texas game wardens round up alligators large and small, from a 14-foot gator in a neighbourhood lake to a small blind gator at risk for poaching.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Out for Blood
programme.desc: It's the start of deer season, and the Texas woods are filled with hunters trying to bag a prize buck. Game Wardens are busy checking hunters across the state, while also investigating a rash of deer stand thefts, and rescuing a trio of baby hawks.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: To Catch a Poacher
programme.desc: A team of Wardens deploy on a multi-county night operation to stop spotlighters and road hunters. Texas Game Wardens check teal hunters on opening weekend. A dead deer found with an arrow still in it leads Game Wardens to a poacher.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Dark Days
programme.desc: The Yukon Men are enduring through what is known as the dark days. Residents team up to keep a large wolf pack at bay. The Moore family must choose a leader for their dog-mushing team. Joey honours his grandmother by hosting a traditional dinner for her.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Black Wolf
programme.desc: A wolf pack continues to encroach. Charlie's only option is to pursue the pack leader. Joey deals with consequences of Alaska's unusually warm winter and turns to his dad for help. Nations thinks the Moore's mushing team is running with the wrong leader.

programme.title: Yukon Men: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Stan has the dangerous task of building an ice road across the Yukon River. Joe and Bob take their chances to embark on a perilous caribou hunt. Charlie confronts Nations about his trapline neglect. Pat and Courtney are faced with an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Gut Check
programme.desc: The pressure is on Nations when the Moores head out for the first major dog sled race of the season. Stan faces a hard decision when one of his dogs falls ill. Charlie has had enough once he sees the state of the trapline he handed over to Nations.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Test
programme.desc: Stan and Pat race to prepare Tanana to be a checkpoint for the Iditarod dog sled race. Charlie and Bob hunt a grizzly that has been terrorizing a miner's camp. Joe trains his new dog, hoping to turn him into a hunting partner.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Nations and Charlie have a confrontation over rights to a family trapline. Stan and Kathleen try to upgrade Tozi cabin, but get more than they bargained for. The Moore's kennel is on the line as Courtney and Nations race in the Yukon River Championship.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: All In
programme.desc: Unseasonably thin ice prevents villagers from reaching valuable hunting grounds, forcing Stan and Charlie to carve a new path through the rugged Alaskan wilderness in search of food. Desperate to provide for his family, James takes a huge risk.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Breaking Point
programme.desc: The Yukon River breaks up earlier than ever. Despite dangerous conditions, Joey crosses the river to hunt geese. Stan and Bob prepare the village for imminent flooding due to the break up, when they realize someone is stuck.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Last Stand
programme.desc: The largest wildfire in Alaskan history torches the land surrounding Tanana and threatens to devour the village. With state resources spread thin, the villagers must band together to battle the blaze or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Yukon Men: From the Ashes
programme.desc: After Alaska's largest wildfire ravages Tanana, the villagers must adapt their subsistence lifestyles to a new, even harsher reality. Two young homesteaders embark upon a dangerous journey in the hopes of starting a new life on the Cosna.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Getting a Head
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a 1969 Buick Skylark. Chumlee and the Old Man look at a Civil War field desk with captured Confederate documents. Rick is shown a human shrunken head.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chummobile
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have an opportunity to buy one of the most recognizable cars of all time: The Batmobile. A letter signed by Thomas Jefferson is found.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Over the Moon
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare for blast off when a piece of heat shield from Apollo 11 rockets into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Take the Money and Run
programme.desc: Take aim with the Pawn Stars when the guys check out a Kentucky Long Rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Beam Me Up
programme.desc: The guys check out a postcard signed by boxer Jack Johnson and some props from the original Star Trek series.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: It's dog-eat-dog for the Pawn Stars when Corey's pet pooch spends a day at the shop. Is it man's best friend or the Old Man's worst nightmare? Then, a guy brings in a cavalry sword used by John Wayne in the movie "Rio Grande."

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You Say You Wanna Revolution
programme.desc: The guys check out an Annual Register from 1776. Corey checks out a set of gambling tokens from the Nevada State Prison. Rick sentences Chumlee to a week of hard labour.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: I'll Be Doggone
programme.desc: Rick checks out a jetpack from the Gemini space program. Then, Chumlee's nuts over a Snoopy comic book with a personal drawing from Charles Schulz.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rescue 9-1-Chum
programme.desc: Rick and the Old Man check out a vintage smoke suit air pump. Corey looks to cash in on a silver certificate when he finds an unexpected error. Later, Chumlee gets hosed when he shows up to work late again.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chords, Swords and Rewards
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a sword belonging to the Freemasons. Will the guys be able to sneak in an offer or will negotiations get chopped? Then, Corey and Chumlee play with the idea of scoring a Gibson Master Museum guitar.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Purple Haze
programme.desc: A collection of Viking items are brought into the shop. Then, Rick checks out a Fender Stratocaster played in the studio by Jimi Hendrix.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Field Trip
programme.desc: The Old Man and Chumlee discover signed photos of Enola Gay; Semi Moseley's personal guitar jams into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mail Mayhem
programme.desc: A signed first edition of 'The Wizard of Oz' and a one of a kind Turbo Drive II arcade game arrive at the shop. Also, Rick goes searching for a package that was supposedly delivered to him.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hidden Pawn
programme.desc: A 1769 playing card with a political message; a motorcycle that was owned by actor Dennis Hopper; an antique stained glass lamp; three 'Charlie's Angels' figurines sneak in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Pawn of Lies
programme.desc: Two original lithographs by graphic artist M.C. Escher; a censored recording made on a Soviet X-ray; a Wells Fargo model stagecoach; a 1950s toy lie detector.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawnball Wizard

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawnshine State

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Business Is Brewing
programme.desc: Rick examines some antique beer memorabilia at the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop. He also takes a trip to a pal's brewery in San Diego to get a history lesson on tap. The guys locate an original McCormick Farmall tractor with a hefty price point.

programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. They suspect the husband and boyfriend. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.desc: The NCIS team searches Los Angeles for a former marine, who was once hired to protect the Iraqi businessman he is now suspected of murdering.

programme.title: NCIS: Reasonable Doubts

programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Curse of the Vampire
programme.desc: Terrifying new discoveries reveal the bloody truth behind the legends of vampires, and experts investigate why people believed these monsters had a taste for human blood.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Hunting the Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the Loch Ness Monster, and experts investigate the world's most mysterious waters in search of evidence that a prehistoric monster could still be lurking in the deep.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Dragon's Inferno
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal hard evidence showing that dragons were not just the stuff of nightmares, and experts use the latest science to explain why people believed in these wicked creatures.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Demons of the Devil
programme.desc: The latest science reveals that demons aren't just the stuff of horror stories, and as experts investigate shocking new archaeological evidence, they uncover the gruesome methods used to exorcise humans of demonic possessions.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: The Kraken Awakens
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that a sea beast like the Kraken could have existed, and experts examine a strange monster that could give shocking answers into this underwater mystery.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Call of the Werewolf
programme.desc: New evidence reveals why a powerful hallucinogenic drug could be to blame for the werewolf, and people suspected of the power were hunted and killed, but even so, many admitted that they could become these deadly creatures.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Master Manipulator
programme.desc: When Brian Cargill divorced his wife, Kimberly, he thought it was the end of the worst time of his life. Instead, he found himself in a desperate battle to save his son, Jamie, from her deadly wrath.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Momma Made Me Help
programme.desc: When Shirley Furgala helped her mother, Betty Lou Beets, drag a dead body to the yard and bury it, she knew her own life might be in danger if she refused to help. What Shirley didn't know was this wouldn't be the last time her mother would ask for help.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Where Evil Grows
programme.desc: A charming 20-year-old wants to help authorities with a murder investigation. He claims to have met one of the three victims and says he has no knowledge of the crime, but detectives suspect otherwise.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher
programme.desc: When Jack 'Roy' Spillman started collecting wolf memorabilia, his sisters thought it was just an odd hobby. But when they learned of horrific things he had done, they realized some people may have been right when they called him 'more animal than human.'

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Crime Writer
programme.desc: Brook Baker, a college journalism major, dreamt of becoming an investigative reporter. When the popular co-ed is brutally murdered while researching a controversial article, the police must sort through hundreds of suspects to find her killer.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: Diane Holik, a vibrant 43-year old, is about to move from Austin to Houston to start a new life with her fiancé. When she misses a meeting at work police are called to her home. There they find her lifeless body and a killer who's left few clues behind.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: True stories of unsuspecting people who lived with killers.

programme.desc: A teenager's shocking murder shatters a small town and destroys her family.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: No Body Two Crimes

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Seven Minutes of Terror

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Family Fun Deck With Plenty of Features
programme.desc: A 1970s-era sunroom and a small deck are taken down to create one space where a family can cook, eat, entertain, and stay warm. The finished project features a two-sided fireplace, water features, and custom privacy.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Back to the Beach on the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach house in Ventnor City, New Jersey, where they can make memories with their daughter on the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Set in Narragansett, Rhode Island
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes in Narragansett, Rhode Island, for many years, a couple finally buys a place of their own that needs a lot of work. Luckily he is a general contractor and ready to take on the challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzella Queen of the Dessert
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe enjoys German inspired carnival treats at Christkindlmarket Milwaukee. First Noah digs into the Austrian Alpine Daug which packs a cheese-stuffed bratwurst into a hearty roll topped with sauerkraut and potato salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Special Occasion
programme.desc: Nothing makes a special occasion more memorable than having the best food! We're counting down the best meals for any special occasion, starting with Beau MacMillan's unforgettable gnocchi in San Diego.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
