programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Aunt Cass Goes Out
programme.desc: After Aunt Cass nearly figures out Hiro’s secret life as a member of Big Hero 6, Hiro plays matchmaker to find Aunt Cass a boyfriend to distract her.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Muira-Horror!
programme.desc: Hiro and Go Go accompany Krei to the woods to deal with Nedd Ludd, however they run into the monster of legend, the Hibagon, along the way.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: So You Think You Can Middle School Dance
programme.desc: It's Herman's first school dance and the gang tries to teach him the ropes, but Herman ends up teaching them instead. Meanwhile, Uncle Will's mom is famous for her gigantic turkeys. Will invites a guest over a feast he won't soon forget.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Blind Date
programme.desc: The gang finds out that Uncle Will has, unknowingly, been set up on a blind date with Bailey's mom. Meanwhile, a target is hired to be on-air talent for a home shopping network owned by Chance's dad.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Float Like a Butterfly, Sting Like a Flea
programme.desc: Herman accidentally draws the ire of a bully at school and prepares for the worst.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Death of a Lima Bean
programme.desc: Herman is devastated when he accidentally kills the lima bean he had been cultivating as a class project and begins to worry about his own safety.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Runaway Recital/ Trike X-5
programme.desc: Kick's dad forces him to learn the piano, but Kick decides to turn it into a stunt that spans the whole town. Kick's sister steals his first stunt bike and turns it into a girly bike.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sister Pact/ Shh!
programme.desc: Kick makes a promise to Brianna to help her get in a prestigious girls club.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Knocked Out/ Not Without My Cereal
programme.desc: Gunther gets in the way of Kick's stunt career/ Kick must look after his sister.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: You've Been Brad'd/ Sleepover
programme.desc: After Kick discovers that he is the sole target of Brad's new Internet prank show, he must find a way to avoid his brother and complete an impossible stunt.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Only the Loan-ly/ Roll Reversal
programme.desc: Kick borrows money from Brianna and faces her wrath when he can't pay it back.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dead Man's Drop/ Stumped
programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Mellowbrook Drift/ Gift of Wacky
programme.desc: Kick challenges the physics nerd bully to a winner-takes-all, gravity-defying race.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Profiles

programme.title: Modern Family: White Christmas

programme.title: Modern Family: Playdates

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Joyride

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Hustle and Flow
programme.desc: The second night of racing against teams that have beaten the MSO continues with some more heavy hitters. Then, a team of outcasts joins forces to compete and team Texas sees their chances of pulling out a win slipping out of reach.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Dirty Hands, Clean Money

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Spies in the Night
programme.desc: Repo mastermind Mike Kennedy braves a potential suicide mission in California's Central Valley in pursuit of big bucks. Kevin Lacey finds himself, and his 25K payday, at the mercy of a vengeful mechanic and a windy, Colorado night.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Under House Arrest
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid return victorious from the moose hunt, uniting the band for the first time. But a sudden cold spell leads to a scramble to make winter shelters. Oliver's refusal to follow the group's plan leads to an explosive confrontation.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Crash
programme.desc: Battling exhaustion, Wild Bill and his crew face the full wrath of the bomb cyclone. A snapped tendon puts the Summer Bay down a man. Josh gambles on crab-rich grounds in a costly venture north. An injured Mac fights to get Junior through the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: As an injury knocks Sig out of his wheelhouse, Mandy takes the helm to face a disgruntled Northwestern crew. On the Wizard, damaged hydraulics and an umbilical hernia deal Keith a double gut punch. Josh and Casey suffer tragedy on the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: Stuffed pots come at a price as Jake scrambles to repair a slack tank before it kills his crab or capsizes the Saga. Josh and Casey's rudder fails in heavy traffic and Wild Bill's new greenhorn makes an easy target for an out-of-control picking hook.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Danger Close
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to haul pots as engine failure threatens their delivery window. As seawater destroys his hydraulic motors, Junior attempts a risky high seas delivery of three new motors. Harley and his crew bang heads over his fishing strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.desc: Jessica juggles multiple brides. Maria brings three generations of family to her appointment including her opinionated grandma. Pamela is a policewoman who wants a grand ballroom-style dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy-Daughter Dilemma
programme.desc: Caitlin has her fitting now that her father is healthy enough to attend.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 'Please Love My Dress'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Assassin's Greed

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auctions and Allies

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fear and Loathing in Placentia
programme.desc: The buyers head to Placentia, Calif., where Jarrod and Brandi find something that may tip the scales in their favour.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Zen Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Rene is being groomed to take over the competition, while Ivy learns a lesson that changes his tune about locker buying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello

programme.title: Storage Wars: Operation Hobo

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Journey in the Darkness

programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: Higher Purpose
programme.desc: Two adorable tiger cubs have outgrown their keepers and need to move to the adult exhibit. A silverback gorilla receives pioneering treatment to curb his worsening eyesight. And a passionate keeper plays matchmaker to a peculiar pair of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Zoo's huge male sea lion is in rut, and staff need to move the younger males before he comes territorial. The veterinary team come up with an ingenious solution to repair Dinky the Flamingo's broken ankle. And feeding a rock python proves challenging.

programme.title: The Zoo: Handle With Care
programme.desc: A tomistoma, a freshwater crocodilian, stops laying eggs and a team of keepers scrambles to treat her. The veterinary team has to rescue a baby antelope that isn't getting the care it needs from its mother. And Mert the Goose takes a field trip.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees

programme.title: Below Deck: Fire!

programme.desc: Captain Lee tests Matt as he removes Bruno from the galley and joins the women for dinner. Jen feels defeated as her and Kate's working relationship deteriorates. Kyle and Jen grow closer, but Kyle has ulterior motives.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Chicken!
programme.desc: The aftermath of Ashton's accident has the entire crew shaken up, especially Captain Lee. While the deck crew is on edge with a man down, Laura struggles to fall in line with her third stew role and her boss Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Penis Cake!

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Entrée-Vous

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: American Revolution

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: Founding Fathers

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: The White House
programme.desc: Located on 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, the White House is one of the most recognizable homes in the world. Henry Rollins takes a look at the shape of the Oval Office and uncovers why a brothel once operated on White House grounds.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About: The Flag
programme.desc: The American flag is one of the most familiar symbols in the world, but it has more stories than you've heard. From its first design to the original pledge, from the Civil War to the Moon, the American flag has taken a journey unlike any other.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Level Up
programme.desc: Booker, Nia and Tess team up to win the end of the year 8th-grade treasure hunt in hopes they can become Carver Middle school legends. Meanwhile, Raven and Chelsea land a segment to promote their business on Chris Spring-Lake's new reality makeover show.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Twister, Sister
programme.desc: When Booker challenges Nia's efforts as an activist, she follows her dad to where he's reporting on a storm to prove to herself and her brother that she is indeed an activist and not a "positivist."

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friend-Ship
programme.desc: Raven and the kids plan a road trip to visit Chelsea at her cruise ship and encounter several obstacles along the way.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Lost at Chel-Sea

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Bummer Rental
programme.desc: It's Fourth of July weekend, and Max surprises Sydney, Olive and Sophia by renting the lake cabin where he spent his best summer as a kid.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: My Best Friends' Ending
programme.desc: Sydney hosts a slumber party with all of her friends, but the night takes a turn when Emmy and Sophia have a huge disagreement, reminiscent of when a pair of expensive sneakers came between Max and Leo in the '90s.

programme.title: Jessie: Cattle Calls and Scary Walls
programme.desc: Jessie auditions for a role in a television series and is convinced that she can talk her way into getting the part. However, it's Zuri who impresses the director. Emma, who Jessie left in charge at home, joins Ravi and Luke to look for rats in the walls.

programme.title: Jessie: Green-Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: Jessie joins a comedy improv class, and Tony goes to embarrassing lengths to prove his love for Jessie. Meanwhile, Ravi recruits Zuri to help him babysit Mrs. Kipling's baby lizards.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Close Encounters of the Camp Kind
programme.desc: After the campers think they see a UFO land in Lake Kikiwaka, a new boy shows up and Jorge and Tiffany think he's an alien. Meanwhile, Emma and Ravi get evaluated by the camp counselors.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed
programme.desc: When Booker becomes responsible for choosing who will represent the class at the district poetry slam, Nia thinks she has a guaranteed spot on the team. Meanwhile, Raven and Chelsea start a DIY renovation on their new business space.

programme.title: Raven's Home: On Edge
programme.desc: When Mr. Arthur tells Booker that he isn't ready to go from sweeping floors to cutting hair at the barbershop, Booker opens his own mobile barbershop in the boys' school bathroom.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Co-Star-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Casting is underway for Liv's co-star in 'Voltage' and some familiar faces show up for the auditions. Meanwhile, Karen arranges a 'cleansing ceremony' for Maddie to help her let go of her feelings for Diggie.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Meatball-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Willow helps Maddie send in a video application for a basketball scholarship. When Willow gets notified that she has received a scholarship and Maddie hasn't heard yet, Maddie gets jealous and blows up at Willow.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Club Owners & Quinceaneras
programme.desc: When Austin hears that a big-time club owner will be at Trish's Quinceañera, the gang plans a stand-out performance to ensure Austin gets noticed. Trish invites Dallas to the party, and Ally is nervous about dancing with him.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Songwriting & Starfish
programme.desc: The gang tries to help Austin get ready for the Hot Summer Jam Contest on the beach, where he could win a chance to have his song played on the radio. Meanwhile, Ally tries to put her previous unpleasant beach-going experiences behind her.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Waka, Waka, Waka!
programme.desc: Ravi and Tiffany get video proof that the Kikiwaka exists. Meanwhile, Emma and Lou try to outsell Hazel at the Kikiwaka Day Festival.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Boo Boos and Birthdays
programme.desc: Emma and Zuri butt heads when trying to plan a surprise birthday party for Tiffany. Meanwhile, in order to get out of a volleyball tournament, Ravi and Jorge fake injuries.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofy's Hot Dog Harvest/ Puppy Birthday to You

programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.desc: When Dhruv’s pocket watch is found in Raj the chicken's coop, Mira must figure out how it got there. Mikku and Chikku's tiny instruments go missing, so Mira must track them down.

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.desc: A young American singer gets akumatized into Frightningale. Armed with a magic mike, she wants to turn Paris into a giant musical. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep the rhythm if they want to stop he.

programme.desc: Adrien's bodyguard gets akumatized into Gorizalla. Endowed with extraordinary strength and an acute sense of smell, he tracks Adrien all through Paris. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't monkey around if they want to stop him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Robostus
programme.desc: A small, sensitive robot named Markov gets akumatized into Robostus, a villain who can bring inanimate objects to life.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sapotis
programme.desc: Alya's little sisters get akumatized into small, out-of-control monsters named Sapotis who wreak havoc in Paris. Epic babysitting session ahead for Ladybug and Cat Noir.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: NCIS: Charade
programme.desc: After Tony's identity is stolen by multiple perpetrators, the fake Special Agent DiNozzos begin blackmailing Senators.

programme.title: NCIS: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Gibbs and Senior FBI Agent T.C. Fornell unite after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape and arrive stateside via a shipping container. Also, McGee is busy apartment hunting and determined to find out how DiNozzo bought his lavish place.

programme.title: NCIS: Decompressed
programme.desc: When a deep sea diver is murdered on the job, his body and suspected coworkers must remain in a high-tech decompression chamber for four days, leaving the team to complete an unorthodox investigation from outside the tank.

programme.title: NCIS: React
programme.desc: When Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter learns that her daughter has been kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to track the case, determine a motive and bring her home. Also, McGee's childhood friend is in town to assist the team with training.

programme.title: NCIS: Loose Cannons
programme.desc: Dr. Cyril Taft experiences the rush of an NCIS case when he is asked to perform surgery on Gibbs' suspect and finds key evidence. Also, Dinozzo pays Jeanne Benoit a visit as he chases a lead involving doctors in Sudan.

programme.title: NCIS: After Hours
programme.desc: The NCIS agents' personal plans are interrupted when they each catch errors in a seemingly cut-and-dry case. Also, McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of not discussing work during dinner, while DiNozzo bores his date with shop talk.

programme.title: NCIS: Scope
programme.desc: The NCIS team re-examines an ambush on a group of Special Ops snipers in Iraq after an American couple is attacked in the same area six months later. When Gibbs needs the account of the lone survivor, he tries to connect with him at Walter Reed Medical.

programme.title: NCIS: Reasonable Doubts
programme.desc: The NCIS team must ascertain who is lying, the wife or the mistress, after the women accuse each other of murdering a Navy Public Affairs officer. Also, Anthony DiNozzo Sr. helps a homeless woman who believes he is her father.

programme.title: NCIS: Charade
programme.desc: After Tony's identity is stolen by multiple perpetrators, the fake Special Agent DiNozzos begin blackmailing Senators.

programme.title: NCIS: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Gibbs and Senior FBI Agent T.C. Fornell unite after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape and arrive stateside via a shipping container. Also, McGee is busy apartment hunting and determined to find out how DiNozzo bought his lavish place.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Best Defense
programme.desc: The detectives suspect the wife of a lawyer when he kills a hit man in his house.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Chinoiserie
programme.desc: When a Chinese immigrant is shot dead, the detectives think it was someone she knew.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Malignant
programme.desc: The murders of two deliverymen lead the detectives to a pharmaceutical drug supplier.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out
programme.desc: After a luxury condo is robbed, the team is shocked to learn that not only was the family fast asleep when the crime occurred, but their teenaged daughter was violated during the invasion as well.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Looking Out for Stateville
programme.desc: Voight convinces Deputy Crowley to bring in his former cellmate, Eddie, as a CI for the unit in order to help bring down a big-time cocaine supplier and his local dealers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Hit Me
programme.desc: Lindsay goes undercover in an effort to track down a rogue police officer targeting women leaving a local casino.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K
programme.desc: While responding to a call of shots fired, Voight, Antonio and Halstead come across a secret battered women's shelter and discover the owner has been wounded.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: If We Were Normal
programme.desc: When a call comes in about a woman stabbing a man then fleeing the scene, Burgess and Lindsay go investigate and find a young woman with the weapon in her hand.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: In a Duffle Bag
programme.desc: Voight responds to a call about a suspicious duffle bag, and uncovers a frigid newborn baby. Determined to find the culprit who abandoned the infant, Intelligence receives a promising lead based on information provided by Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice
programme.desc: After a hooded man opens fire on their patrol car, Roman is left wounded and Burgess takes off after the shooter. No gun is found at the crime scene and the victim is a 17-year-old honour student who will likely never walk again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out
programme.desc: After a luxury condo is robbed, the team is shocked to learn that not only was the family fast asleep when the crime occurred, but their teenaged daughter was violated during the invasion as well.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Adventures in Baby Getting
programme.desc: When Marge's car falls into a sink hole, she buys the perfect replacement. However, she grows to hate it since, as she tells a shocked Homer, it would be too small if she wanted to have another baby.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Abie Gone
programme.desc: When Grampa escapes from his retirement home, Homer and Marge frantically try to track him down by following clues that reveal secrets in Grampa's past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Earth Stood Cool

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Cur With Love
programme.desc: When a fire at the retirement home forces Grampa to move home with the Simpsons, Homer throws out his back on moving day and decides to stay home to recover.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School
programme.desc: Homer joins the 'Springfield Preppers,' an off-the-grid survivalist group whose leader has set up a top-secret retreat outside of town to prepare for the end of the world.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anger Management

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Jersey Shore Dogs

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Mow, Mow, Mow Your Goat
programme.desc: Before the Pols can go work on their lake house, Dr. Pol must treat an array of clients.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Dr. Franken-Pol
programme.desc: Neck bites and thunderous growls rattle cages at Pol Veterinary as they feel the horror of the Halloween season.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: One Great Dane
programme.desc: It’s an emotional time for the Pols as they say farewell to their beloved Great Dane, Frija.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Cesar takes on three dogs whose obsessions have led to a disquieting life for both the canines and their owners.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Attila's Forbidden Tomb
programme.desc: A new, cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the long-lost tomb of Attila the Hun, and with the help of the latest science, experts follow newly unearthed leads to a potentially history-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Attila's Forbidden Tomb
programme.desc: A new, cutting-edge archaeological investigation might reveal the long-lost tomb of Attila the Hun, and with the help of the latest science, experts follow newly unearthed leads to a potentially history-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for King Arthur's Castle
programme.desc: A castle in Scotland could be the home of King Arthur's legendary round table. Scientists have made a gruesome discovery at this mysterious site: a disfigured skeleton that could reveal the castle's bloody secrets and rewrite the history books.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Attack of the Thunderballs
programme.desc: Astronauts are evacuated when a mystery object is discovered hurtling towards the ISS, a NASA secret agent goes undercover to recover missing moon rocks and scientists struggle to find answers when they find a huge void at the edge of the solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto Under Pressure
programme.desc: Lost tapes reveal that Apollo astronauts heard unexplained transmissions on the far side of the moon, an amateur astronomer spots a strange disturbance in Martian atmosphere and an unidentified object in Earth orbit starts stalking Russian spacecraft.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Ice Creatures
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong goes into an unexplained spin. He needs to figure out what's causing it, or he faces certain death. An Apollo 17 photo seems to show a U.S. military outpost on the moon. Could there be alien life swimming in the oceans of Jupiter's moons?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Earth Have Two Moons?
programme.desc: A starling discovery suggests that the hellish clouds of Venus may be the origin of life on Earth. A bizarre sighting 2,000 years ago raises the possibility that the Earth once had two moons. A NASA scientist helps the FBI crack the 1996 Olympic bombing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Invisible Planet
programme.desc: A probe carrying a message to aliens mysteriously malfunctions as it enters deep space. A NASA mission goes disastrously wrong when an imposter breaches Mission Control. Astronomers find evidence of an invisible planet in a distant solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Full Moon
programme.desc: Two cosmonauts are trapped inside a capsule in a frozen lake; a NASA scientist investigates the deadly Nazi secret that doomed the Hindenburg; a full moon affects NASA experiments.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Earth Next Door
programme.desc: Astronomers detect a potentially habitable planet tantalizingly close to Earth. A chance discovery at NASA reveals a top secret military space program. The Apollo missions bring back evidence that the moon could be rich in the building blocks for life.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Stranger Things
programme.desc: Astronomers find evidence for alien technology around a distant star; the first pictures of Pluto show that something might be moving across its surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Gas Giant
programme.desc: Jupiter is hotter than it should be and scientists don't understand why; the Curiosity Rover finds something strange on Mars; detectives turn to NASA for help with a murder cold case.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: A President's Close Encounter
programme.desc: Geysers are discovered on a frozen moon, and NASA redirects a probe on a daring mission to detect evidence of life. An unidentified object is spotted approaching a near-earth asteroid. A future US President is an eyewitness to a UFO.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women take the wedding vow 'till death do us part' seriously; they make sure their marriages are "Fatal Ties."

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are plain barbaric.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Grudge
programme.desc: With her good looks and sunny demeanor, doctor's assistant and part-time model Christine Kent attracts her fair share of admirers. But after one encounter ignites jealousy and obsession, Christine is blind-sided by the devastating consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Watcher
programme.desc: On a rare day off from work, single mom Carrie Caudill and a friend embark on a well-deserved girl's night out. But out of nowhere, an unexpected confrontation puts Carrie on a dangerous collision course with a calculating and sadistic madman.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Undercover Girlfriend
programme.desc: University of Illinois graduate student, Yingying Zhang, disappears after climbing into a stranger's car. She was never seen again. Police enlist their suspected killer's girlfriend to wear a wire and record their conversations.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Last Seen Walking
programme.desc: Before Leah Freeman's body was found outside of her hometown of Coquille, Oregon, in 2000, her gym shoes, one of them bloody, were virtually the only physical clues police had to figure out what had happened to the missing 15-year-old.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Grudge
programme.desc: With her good looks and sunny demeanor, doctor's assistant and part-time model Christine Kent attracts her fair share of admirers. But after one encounter ignites jealousy and obsession, Christine is blind-sided by the devastating consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Runaway Murder
programme.desc: A businessman with a family in California and a mistress in China thinks he has it all, but this international dalliance has deadly consequences. Then, in central Louisiana, an unlikely co-ed love triangle ends in murder, but there is more to this story.

programme.title: Deadly Affairs: Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: Shaun Cleland's military career separates him from his young bride. And when they each take lovers, someone is bound to lose it all.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Liaisons
programme.desc: She was a small town girl from rural Wisconsin. He was a Chicago superstar, a hometown hero with the legendary Bears. Together, they were expecting their first child. But no one was expecting their tale to end in the deadly way it did.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping: Part 1
programme.desc: The murder of Nancy Phister, an A-lister and socialite in a town famous for its glitzy ski resorts and celebrities, is investigated.

programme.title: Dateline: While She Was Sleeping: Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of Nancy Phister continues.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Go to Daddy
programme.desc: The black sheep of the family has spent a lifetime in the shadow of her prodigal younger sister. As the relationship with her mother takes a turn for the worse, things build to a boil that will leave one family member dead.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Letter
programme.desc: A mysterious letter surfaces and contains a shocking twist in a homicide investigation. An entire family is impacted by the bombshell police uncover.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Murder is a Filthy Business
programme.desc: A well-intentioned social worker goes missing after becoming involved with two sisters raising children in a trash-ridden house.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Drowning in Despair
programme.desc: The accidental drowning of their two children strains Lonnie and Betty Jo Fowler's marriage to the breaking point. But after reconciling and moving closer to family, a sister-in-law's suspicions turn violent.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Joseph Stalin
programme.desc: It's clear Nazi Germany lost the war, but the real winner remains uncertain. At the Yalta Conference, the United States, Britain and the Soviet Union compete for domination of Europe.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Jokin' Around in Georgia
programme.desc: Homeowners use their own skills to turn a disaster house into a high-dollar flip.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Nevada Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow in Nevada. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wonton Ways
programme.desc: The humble wonton skin may look exotic but it's also the most versatile pasta you can invite into your kitchen.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sandwich Craft
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he and his nephew Elton dose up a little sandwich-craft.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Bird In The Pan: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this classic roast chicken episode with new flavours, new science and a strange new twist on 'broiling'.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload
programme.desc: A lot has happened in the world of coffee since this show dropped in 2000; since then, Alton Brownhas brewed (and consumed) a lot of coffee. Here's his new look at roasting, grinding, brewing and thegear you need to do it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Boston is the heart of New England, the birthplace of American independence and home to so many delicious foods that it calls for more than one visit! Andrew Zimmern explores the flavours of Boston neighborhoods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael McKean reveals the truth behind the most important meal of the day, breakfast.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hungry for Love
programme.desc: Chocolate and romance go hand in hand; explore if this love affair really backed up by chemistry.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Some Like It Hot

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Hole in One
programme.desc: Michael McKean shares the 'hole' story of everyone's favorite middle-missing baked goods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite foods went from paupers to princes. He looks at lobster's prison past, whether creme brulee was always the cream of the crop, and if champagne's fizz almost burst its bubble.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Power Couples
programme.desc: Michael McKean takes a look at how some favorite food combinations got hitched. Michael traces the origins of peanut butter and jelly to the trenches of World War II, sees how spaghetti and meatballs went from Italy to America.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Bubble Bath
programme.desc: When Pluto's bubble bath gets out of hand, Mickey and Pluto each get stuck in a Giant Bubble and start floating away from the Clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy in the Sky
programme.desc: A bunch of balloons carry Daisy, Pluto and Minnie away in the sky.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Dinosaur Romp
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick-Tock Time Machine lets a little dinosaur named Baby Dinah loose in the Clubhouse Carnival, Mickey and pals travel back in time to return Baby Dinah to her prehistoric home .

programme.title: Chuggington: Wilson's Wag-A-Lagon / The 3 Ways of the Track
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ready, Get Pet ... Go PLUTO!/ Figaro's New Friend!
programme.desc: When pets are allowed to join their owners on a race, Pluto and Pete's dog Butch try to upstage each other. The Happy Helpers look after Pluto, and Figaro gets jealous.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged: Two Close Friends / Mr. Bigby's Big Night
programme.desc: Mickey and Donald accidentally become handcuffed together. Later, the happy helpers help Mr. Bigby throw a birthday party for his wife.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Biggest Hero/ Think Quick
programme.desc: Rocky gets jealous when Tiny suddenly becomes the go-to hero! Mazu may be a slow runner but is a quick thinker.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Rakhi Mystery/ Mystery Below the Palace
programme.desc: When the bracelets that Mira and her friends made for the Rakhi holiday disappear, Mira sets out to find them before the celebration starts. When strange sounds are heard at the palace, Queen Shanti asks Mira to find out what is causing the ruckus.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mid-Air Care / The Itsy Bitsy Baby
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Bluey: Bus / Mum School / Piggyback
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Tea Party Tantrum!/ Blast Off!
programme.desc: When Doc's doll starts to act cranky during their tea party, Doc realizes it's because the doll's eyes are stuck open. Doc makes a seat belt for the toy pilot Star Blazer Zero to wear so he won't fall apart every time he crashes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Chinese Woman
programme.desc: George's crossed phone lines acquaint the gang with a woman who is not what she seems. Kramer makes a change in his choice of undergarments. George's parents discuss separation.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If My Hole Could Talk
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself attracted to an older woman who writes self-help books. Alan and Jake battle over a school assignment.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Waiting for the Right Snapper
programme.desc: Charlie tries to resist temptation when he meets the grown daughter of the woman he's dating, and then realizes they've met before.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Baré
programme.desc: When Erica is getting the bulk of her college acceptance letters, Barry is determined to become a doctor and starts to check out schools with the best medical programs.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges
programme.desc: Christy has trouble accepting how much easier life is with Bonnie in the house. Meanwhile, Baxter sets up camp in the driveway.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Rogers v. Campbell/ Rogers

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Chappell vs. Chappell
programme.desc: A married woman from Newton, NC hopes her life’s biggest mistake, an affair, didn’t produce a child out of wedlock.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A plaintiff is suing her co-worker for damage to her car; the defendant claims worn tires contributed to the collision. Then, a plaintiff is suing for missed rent, property damages and eviction fees.

programme.title: Judge Mathis

programme.desc: Segments include 'No Way to Treat a Friend ' and 'Nearly Knocking off Newton.'

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Pegasus
programme.desc: The mood abroad the Galactica turns jubilant when the top-of-the-line battlestar Pegasus, long thought to have been annihilated with the rest of the colonial fleet, appears out of nowhere.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Resurrection Ship Part 1
programme.desc: The Battlestar Galactica and Pegasus face a new Cylon target while a power struggle threatens to result in all-out war among the human fleet.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Resurrection Ship Part 2
programme.desc: Differences are put aside as both Battlestars unite in order to fight against the Cylons. Baltar is interested in Gina.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Epiphanies
programme.desc: As President Roslin nears death, Dr. Gaius Baltar must be groomed for the worst case scenario. Roslin orders the death of Sharon's unborn child. A sabotaged Viper leads to an investigation that uncovers a movement of people seeking peace with the Cylons.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Black Market
programme.desc: President Roslin's quest to end rampant black market trading sparks violence and an investigation that reaches deep into military, civilian and government circles.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Scar
programme.desc: A crazed Cylon Raider attacks the Colonial fleet in a series of hit-and-run attacks. Overworked Viper pilots must defend a mining operation from this Raider that they nickname 'Scar".

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Sacrifice
programme.desc: A woman takes hostages on Cloud Nine and demands that Adama turn over Sharon in order to avenge her husband's death at the hands of the Cylons.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: The Captain's Hand
programme.desc: Apollo assists in the search for a missing Raptor team as the new commander of the Pegasus grows increasingly unstable.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Downloaded
programme.desc: The conquerors of occupied Caprica hail two "heroes of the Cylon", who both resist their new celebrity.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Lay Down Your Burdens Part 1
programme.desc: The accidental discovery of a habitable planet sparks a debate in the fleet: whether to begin to colonize or to keep on seeking Earth.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Lay Down Your Burdens Part 2
programme.desc: When Baltar wins the vote, Roslin considers stealing the election because he is a Cylon collaborator.
